name: Locatalyze v2 – A2 Rent v9 (6 SerpAPI calls, 20-pt median)

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ '"' + $json.locality + '" OR "' + $json.area + '" retail shop lease sqm "per annum" ' + $json.city + ' 2025 -"for sale"' }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $json.area + ' ' + $json.city + ' nearby suburb retail shop lease sqm "per annum" Australia 2025 -"for sale"' }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $json.area + ' ' + $json.city + ' retail lease sqm per annum site:jll.com.au OR site:cbre.com.au OR site:colliers.com.au OR site:nelsonalexander.com.au' }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ '(site:commercialrealestate.com.au OR site:realcommercial.com.au) ' + $json.area + ' ' + $json.city + ' retail lease "per annum" sqm 2025 -"for sale"' }}

parameters.jsCode: const all=$input.all();let geoResult=null;for(const item of all){if(item.json?.results?.[0]?.geometry){geoResult=item.json.results[0];break;}}const inputs=$('Parse & Validate Inputs').item.json;let lat=geoResult?.geometry?.location?.lat??null;let lng=geoResult?.geometry?.location?.lng??null;const inAU=(v)=>v&&v>=-44&&v<=-10;const inAUlng=(v)=>v&&v>=112&&v<=154;const validGeo=lat&&lng&&inAU(lat)&&inAUlng(lng);if(!validGeo){const iLat=parseFloat(inputs.lat??inputs._lat??0);const iLng=parseFloat(inputs.lng??inputs._lng??0);if(iLat&&iLng&&inAU(iLat)&&inAUlng(iLng)){lat=iLat;lng=iLng;}else{lat=-37.8136;lng=144.9631;}}return[{json:{_all_inputs:all.map(i=>i.json),_area_lat:lat,_area_lng:lng}}];
